HomeCase Studies

Case Studies

Proof-led transformation, built for the boardroom

The SRS identified case studies as a critical missing layer. This page gives the new site a proof structure ready for approved client stories, logos, and quantified outcomes.

Representative case study

01

Healthcare & Life Sciences

Modernized QA delivery for a regulated healthcare platform

Problem

A healthcare technology team needed faster release cycles while maintaining HIPAA-aligned controls and production stability.

Solution

ConglomerateIT created a QA/QE pod covering automation, non-functional testing, release governance, and observability.

Tech stack

PlaywrightSeleniumJMeterAzure DevOpsDatadog

Outcomes

42% faster regression cycles
30% lower testing cost
24/7 release visibility

Representative case study

02

Financial Services

Cloud modernization roadmap for a multi-region fintech team

Problem

A fintech organization needed to rationalize legacy applications, reduce infrastructure spend, and strengthen PCI-DSS readiness.

Solution

Our cloud and infrastructure teams mapped workloads, built a migration plan, and implemented secure landing-zone patterns.

Tech stack

AWSTerraformKubernetesCloudWatchZero Trust IAM

Outcomes

35% infrastructure savings
2x faster environment provisioning
Improved audit readiness

Representative case study

03

Enterprise Platforms

Salesforce and data workflow transformation for a global sales org

Problem

Sales teams were operating across disconnected CRM, reporting, and support workflows with limited pipeline visibility.

Solution

ConglomerateIT redesigned Salesforce workflows, integrated analytics, and created executive dashboards for revenue operations.

Tech stack

SalesforceServiceNowDatabricksPower BIREST APIs

Outcomes

28% faster sales operations
Unified executive reporting
Cleaner lead-to-cash handoff

Next proof layer

Replace representative studies with approved client wins.

The page is intentionally structured around the SRS requirement: problem, solution, tech stack, and measurable outcomes. When approved references are available, they can drop into the same layout.

Build the proof engine

Add client logos, testimonials, video case studies, downloadable PDFs, and industry-filtered story pages as the content engine matures.

Start a transformation brief

Transforming businesses with tomorrow's technology, today. Global IT services across 4 countries, 500+ projects, 12 years of experience, and 95% client retention.
